{{Infobox character
| name = Renfei
| aliases = Pai Ren
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Highgold, Truegold
| abilities = Cloud Hammer madra, Path of the Cloud Hammer
| affiliations = Skysworn, Cloud Hammer sect
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Renfei Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Renfei, also known as Pai Ren, was a member of the [[Skysworn]]. A slight woman with black hair worn in a ponytail, she was characterized by her composed and controlled demeanor. She utilized [[Cloud Hammer madra]] to create protective hazes and possessed a [[Goldsign]] in the form of a gray cloud that hovered above her. As an [[Underlord]], she held significant status within the [[Empire]], though this rank did not grant her the power to restrict the freedom of other Underlords. Renfei served alongside her partner, [[Bai Rou]], and was tasked with supervising trainees such as Wei Shi [[Lindon]]. Her career included earning her place in the [[Skysworn]] years prior, and she took great pride in the organization's prestige and recruitment standards. Renfei eventually died following a single attack from [[Akura Harmony]].}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] is a member of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] is a partner of [[Bai Rou]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Renfei]] carries a hammer.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Renfei is a [[Highgold]] and a member of the [[Skysworn]] who carries a dark hammer. Characterized by her calm composure, she has black hair tied in a tail and is often seen with a gray cloud hovering over her head. During an incident, she assisted in dragging [[Lindon]] into a building and performed a scan of the host before granting her entry into the [[Skysworn]]. As part of the group supervising [[Lindon]]'s squad, she utilizes her [[madra]] to stand upon dark platforms of solid cloud.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] carries a dark hammer.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] is calm and composed with black hair in a tail and a gray cloud hovering over her head.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] is a [[Skysworn]] who uses a hammer.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Pai Ren is a member of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] helped drag [[Lindon]] into a building.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] scanned the host before allowing her into the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] is a member of the group supervising [[Lindon]]'s squad.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Renfei]] stands on dark platforms of solid cloud generated with her [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Truegold]] of the [[Cloud Hammer sect]], Renfei is a [[Skysworn]] known for her authoritative voice. During combat, she cycles [[madra]] to draw wisps of dark cloud around her armor and utilizes this substance as a method of attack. Using [[Cloud Hammer madra]], she eventually sent a message to [[Bai Rou]] concerning the presence of multiple enemies. Renfei was also noted in a mention by [[Mercy]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] is a [[Skysworn]] with an authoritative voice.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] uses [[Cloud Hammer madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] is a character who can use dark cloud as an attack.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] was cycling [[madra]] that drew wisps of dark cloud around her armor.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] was a [[Truegold]] from the [[Cloud Hammer sect]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] sent a message to [[Bai Rou]] regarding multiple enemies.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei]] is someone [[Mercy]] mentioned.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Renfei]] is a person [[Naru Gwei]] is involved with.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Renfei]] is dead.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Renfei]] has the [[Path of the Cloud Hammer]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“...but you're a Highgold,” Renfei continued.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Renfei's message to Bai Rou had played loud enough for them all, and the phrase “multiple enemies” was all she needed to hear.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
